title: 10 best herbal teas for stye
description: Urtica dioica, also known as stinging nettle, teas helps with stye because of its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The tea's active compounds, such as flavonoids and polyphenols, help reduce swelling and fight off bacterial infections that can cause styes. Additionally, the tea's astringent properties help to dry out the affected area, promoting healing and reducing the risk of further infection.
